items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE and .4 miles east of Exit 342: US 13/30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO. There is a lane restriction.
